draftSync.authRequiredDesc: Please log in to sync drafts.
draftSync.noProfileDesc: Please select a profile to sync drafts with.
draftSync.noDraftsDesc: You don't have any draft applications to sync.
draftSync.successDesc: {{count}} draft application{{count > 1 ? 's' : ''}} updated with your latest profile information.
draftSync.partialDesc: Updated {{updated}} drafts, but {{failed}} failed. Check console for details.
draftSync.failedDesc: Failed to sync drafts with your profile. Please try again.
